Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q applies bleed. Your E dash and W slow are key. Space with E and slow him with W.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk at him to avoid. Your E escape is crucial.
Darius.early_game: Trade with Q poke and W slow. Use E to escape his bleed range.
Darius.mid_game: Your ult is strong in teamfights. His ult is deadly — avoid low HP.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through utility. Both strong in fights — spacing matters.
Darius.win_condition: Trade with Q and W slow. Use E to escape. Avoid low HP.
Darius.positioning: Trade Q and W slow. Use E to escape. Space carefully.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence doesn't affect you much. Your Q and W slow are strong. Trade when W is up.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — move away. Your W slow stops him.
Garen.early_game: Trade with Q and W slow. He scales to be tankier but you scale too.
Garen.mid_game: Your ult helps teamfights. His tankiness improves. Trade carefully.
Garen.late_game: Even — both scale as tankier units.
Garen.win_condition: Trade Q and W slow when safe. Use E to escape. Scale into teamfights.
Garen.positioning: Trade Q and W. Use E to escape. Teamfight grouped.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry negates your Q and W. Your E escape is critical. Use E to avoid fights.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — use E to escape before she parries. Don't trade into it.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora's parry is oppressive. Use E to avoid fights. Don't trade.
Fiora.mid_game: Your ult helps but she split pushes. Avoid dueling her.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through ult utility. Avoid 1v1s.
Fiora.win_condition: Use E to avoid fights. Never trade into parry. Group for teamfights.
Fiora.positioning: Use E defensively. Avoid her parry. Group for teamfights.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's E stun is oppressive. Your Q and W are strong but risky into E. Use E to escape.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun counter — use E to dash away before it triggers. Don't trade into E.
Jax.early_game: Jax dominates early. Use E to avoid fights. Farm with Q from range.
Jax.mid_game: Your ult helps but he duels better. Avoid extending.
Jax.late_game: You outscale through ult utility. Avoid dueling him.
Jax.win_condition: Use E to escape. Trade with Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Jax.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo is fast and oppressive. Your E escape is critical. Use E to avoid her.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash combo — use E to escape before she closes. Don't trade.
Riven.early_game: Riven's burst dominates. Use E to escape fights. Don't trade.
Riven.mid_game: Your ult helps but her split push is strong. Group for fights.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through ult. Riven struggles grouped.
Riven.win_condition: Use E to escape. Farm with Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Riven.positioning: Use E defensively. Farm Q from range. Group for teamfights.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q range is massive. Your Q and W are strong but risky. Trade from distance with Q.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — move sideways. Use W to slow if he closes.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox Q outranges you. Trade from distance with Q. Use E to escape.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your ult helps. His all-in is still strong. Use W to kite.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through ult. He falls off compared to you.
Aatrox.win_condition: Trade Q from distance. Use W to slow. Use E to escape.
Aatrox.positioning: Trade Q from distance. Use W to kite. Use E to escape.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser's all-in is oppressive. Your E escape is crucial. Use E to avoid his E pull.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — use E to dash away before he pulls. Avoid close fights.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser dominates early. Use E to escape. Trade with Q from range.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your ult helps. His ult can isolate you in fights. Group with team.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You outscale through ult utility. He can't stop your teamfights.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Use E to escape his E. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your Q and W slow completely zone him. Dominate early.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — move away or use E to escape. Your W slow is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with Q poke and W slow. Nasus is helpless. Build a lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps him. Use ult in fights.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through ult. Group for fights.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with Q and W. Build lead. Group for fights late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through ult.
Nasus.positioning: Poke aggressively early. Use W to zone. Group for fights late.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion's Q poke is strong. Your Q and W are strong. Trade Q for Q carefully.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q slow — move sideways. Your W slows him back.
Sion.early_game: Trade Q for Q. Use W to slow when he approaches.
Sion.mid_game: Both scale into tankiness. Your ult helps. Trade carefully.
Sion.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your ult vs his tankiness.
Sion.win_condition: Trade Q for Q. Use W to kite. Use E to escape.
Sion.positioning: Trade Q for Q. Use W to slow. Use E to escape.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your Q outpokes. Your W slow is key. Trade gradually.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces armor but your W still slows.
Malphite.early_game: Trade with Q and W slow. He scales to be tankier.
Malphite.mid_game: Your ult helps. His tankiness scales. Trade carefully.
Malphite.late_game: Even — both scale as tankier units.
Malphite.win_condition: Trade Q and W slow. Use E to escape. Group for teamfights.
Malphite.positioning: Trade Q and W. Use E to escape. Group for teamfights.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's early range is limited. Your Q outpokes. Trade aggressively early.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her R invincibility — don't commit when she ults. Focus other targets.
Kayle.early_game: Dominate with Q poke. Kayle's range is limited early.
Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your ult helps. Trade carefully.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through ult. Group for fights.
Kayle.win_condition: Dominate early with Q. Build lead. Group for fights late.
Kayle.scaling: Even — both scale well late game.
Kayle.positioning: Trade Q aggressively early. Group for fights late.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick's ghouls are oppressive early. Your Q and W are decent. Trade from range.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E cage — move sideways. Your W slow helps kite.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls zone you. Trade Q from range. Use W to slow.
Yorick.mid_game: Your ult helps. His maiden is strong. Avoid dueling him.
Yorick.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid his 1v1s.
Yorick.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Use ult in fights.
Yorick.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W to kite. Use ult in fights.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E test is devastating. Your Q and W are decent. Trade from range.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E tentacle test — move away from her. Use W to slow if she closes.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi's tentacles zone you. Trade Q from range. Use W to slow.
Illaoi.mid_game: Your ult helps. Her tentacles zone fights. Trade carefully.
Illaoi.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid her tentacles.
Illaoi.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Use ult in fights.
Illaoi.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W to kite. Space from tentacles.

Camille.trading_pattern: Camille's E hook and dueling are oppressive. Your E escape is critical. Use E to avoid.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Her E hook — use E to dash away before it triggers. Don't trade.
Camille.early_game: Camille's dueling dominates. Use E to avoid fights. Trade Q from range.
Camille.mid_game: Your ult helps. Her dueling is still strong. Avoid extending.
Camille.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid dueling her.
Camille.win_condition: Use E to escape. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Camille.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.

Olaf.trading_pattern: Olaf's Q slow and W sustain are oppressive. Your W slow is key. Trade with W when safe.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: His Q axe slow — move sideways. Use W to slow him back.
Olaf.early_game: Olaf's poke dominates. Trade Q from range. Use W to slow.
Olaf.mid_game: Your ult helps. His R makes him unkiteable. Use W defensively.
Olaf.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid dueling him.
Olaf.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Use E to escape.
Olaf.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Use E to escape.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn's W brittle and E charge are oppressive. Your E escape is crucial. Use E to avoid.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His E charge — use E to dash away. Don't get caught.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn's all-in dominates. Use E to avoid fights. Trade Q from range.
Ornn.mid_game: Your ult helps. His tankiness scales. Trade carefully.
Ornn.late_game: You outscale through ult. His upgrades are annoying but you win.
Ornn.win_condition: Use E to escape. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Ornn.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.

Maokai.trading_pattern: Maokai's W pull and Q poke are strong. Your Q and W are decent. Trade from range.
Maokai.ability_to_dodge: His W pull — move away when he winds up. Use W to slow if he closes.
Maokai.early_game: Maokai's poke is strong. Trade Q from range. Use W to slow.
Maokai.mid_game: Your ult helps. His tankiness scales. Trade carefully.
Maokai.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your ult vs his CC.
Maokai.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Use ult in fights.
Maokai.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Group for teamfights.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar's poke from range is oppressive. Your Q matches his range. Trade from distance.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His E hop — move away from him. Your W slow stops him.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar's ranged poke dominates. Trade Q from range. Use W to slow.
Gnar.mid_game: Your ult helps. His mega form is scary. Use W to kite.
Gnar.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid his mega form.
Gnar.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Avoid mega form.
Gnar.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W to slow. Avoid mega form.

Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear's W bite and all-in are oppressive. Your E escape is critical. Use E to avoid.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His R storm dive — use E to escape the impact zone.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear's all-in dominates. Use E to avoid fights. Trade Q from range.
Volibear.mid_game: Your ult helps. His tankiness scales. Use W to slow.
Volibear.late_game: You outscale through ult. Avoid dueling him.
Volibear.win_condition: Use E to escape. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.
Volibear.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade Q from range. Group for teamfights.
